courses.title: Full Stack Web Development with MERN Stack
courses.description: Master the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js) from scratch. Build real-world projects including an e-commerce platform, social media app, and portfolio website. Learn authentication, REST APIs, state management, and deployment.
courses.shortDescription: Complete MERN stack bootcamp - from zero to full stack developer
courses.instructorBio: Senior Full Stack Developer with 8+ years of experience at top tech companies. Built 50+ production applications.
courses.syllabus: [{"week":1,"title":"HTML5 & CSS3 Foundations","topics":["Semantic HTML","Flexbox & Grid","Responsive Design","CSS Animations"]},{"week":2,"title":"JavaScript Deep Dive","topics":["ES6+","Async/Await","DOM Manipulation","Event Handling"]},{"week":3,"title":"React.js Fundamentals","topics":["Components","Hooks","State Management","React Router"]},{"week":4,"title":"Advanced React","topics":["Context API","Redux Toolkit","Custom Hooks","Performance Optimization"]},{"week":5,"title":"Node.js & Express.js","topics":["REST APIs","Middleware","Authentication","File Uploads"]},{"week":6,"title":"MongoDB & Deployment","topics":["Mongoose","Aggregation","AWS/Vercel Deployment","CI/CD"]}]
courses.features: ["48+ hours of HD video","15 real-world projects","Lifetime access","Certificate of completion","Discord community access","1-on-1 doubt resolution"]

courses.title: Next.js 14 - Complete Production Guide
courses.description: Build production-ready applications with Next.js 14. Learn App Router, Server Components, Server Actions, streaming, caching strategies, and deployment. Includes building a complete SaaS platform.
courses.shortDescription: Build production-grade apps with Next.js 14 and React Server Components
courses.instructorBio: Frontend architect and Next.js contributor. Google Developer Expert in Web Technologies.
courses.syllabus: [{"week":1,"title":"Next.js 14 Fundamentals","topics":["App Router","Layouts","Loading UI","Error Handling"]},{"week":2,"title":"Server Components & Actions","topics":["RSC","Server Actions","Data Fetching","Caching"]},{"week":3,"title":"Authentication & Database","topics":["NextAuth.js","Prisma","PostgreSQL","Middleware"]},{"week":4,"title":"SaaS Platform Project","topics":["Stripe Integration","Dashboard","Admin Panel","Deployment"]}]
courses.features: ["32+ hours of content","SaaS platform project","Source code included","Lifetime updates"]

courses.title: Data Science & Analytics with Python
courses.description: Complete data science course covering Python, NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, Seaborn, SQL, and statistical analysis. Work on real datasets from Kaggle and build a portfolio of data analysis projects.
courses.shortDescription: From Python basics to advanced data analysis and visualization
courses.instructorBio: PhD in Statistics, former Data Scientist at Amazon. Published researcher with 15+ papers.

courses.features: ["40+ hours of video","10 real-world datasets","Kaggle competitions","Interview preparation"]

courses.title: Advanced SQL & Database Engineering
courses.description: Master advanced SQL queries, database design, performance optimization, and data engineering. Learn PostgreSQL, MySQL, indexing, stored procedures, and ETL pipelines.
courses.shortDescription: Expert-level SQL and database architecture for data professionals
courses.instructorBio: Database Architect with 12 years of experience. Ex-Oracle and Microsoft.
courses.syllabus: [{"week":1,"title":"Advanced SQL Queries","topics":["Window Functions","CTEs","Recursive Queries","Subqueries"]},{"week":2,"title":"Database Design","topics":["Normalization","ER Diagrams","Partitioning","Sharding"]},{"week":3,"title":"Performance & Optimization","topics":["Indexing","Query Plans","Caching","Monitoring"]},{"week":4,"title":"Data Engineering","topics":["ETL Pipelines","Data Warehousing","dbt","Airflow"]}]
courses.features: ["28+ hours of content","Real database scenarios","Performance labs","Certificate"]

courses.title: Machine Learning A-Z: From Basics to Mastery
courses.description: Comprehensive machine learning course covering supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning. Implement algorithms from scratch and using scikit-learn, TensorFlow. Build 10+ ML projects.
courses.shortDescription: Complete machine learning journey with hands-on projects
courses.instructorBio: ML Research Scientist, IIT Delhi Professor. 20+ years in AI/ML research and teaching.
courses.syllabus: [{"week":1,"title":"ML Foundations","topics":["Linear Algebra","Probability","Python Setup","Data Preprocessing"]},{"week":2,"title":"Supervised Learning","topics":["Linear Regression","Logistic Regression","SVM","Decision Trees"]},{"week":3,"title":"Ensemble Methods","topics":["Random Forest","XGBoost","Bagging","Boosting"]},{"week":4,"title":"Unsupervised Learning","topics":["K-Means","PCA","DBSCAN","Anomaly Detection"]},{"week":5,"title":"Neural Networks","topics":["Perceptrons","Backpropagation","TensorFlow","Keras"]},{"week":6,"title":"ML in Production","topics":["Model Deployment","MLOps","A/B Testing","Monitoring"]}]
courses.features: ["52+ hours of video","10+ ML projects","Math foundations","Industry case studies","Job placement support"]

courses.instructorBio: AI Researcher at Google Brain. Published 30+ papers on deep learning and NLP.

courses.title: Complete Full Stack Node.js Developer Bootcamp
courses.description:
Master modern full-stack web development from beginner to advanced level.

This comprehensive bootcamp covers everything required to become a professional Full Stack Developer. Learn frontend development with HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, React, Redux, and Next.js. Build powerful backend APIs using Node.js and Express. Work with MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Prisma ORM, authentication systems, payment gateways, cloud deployment, Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and enterprise-level security practices.

Build multiple production-ready projects including an E-Commerce Platform, Learning Management System, and AI SaaS Application. By the end of the course, you'll have a strong portfolio, deployment experience, and the skills required for modern developer roles.
courses.shortDescription: Become a professional Full Stack Developer using React, Next.js, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Docker, DevOps, Security, Authentication, and Cloud Deployment.
courses.instructorBio: Senior Full Stack Engineer with 10+ years of experience building scalable SaaS products, enterprise applications, and cloud-native systems. Specialized in React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, DevOps, and application security.
